subject: A winged skeletal or exposed figure ascending in an eruption of fire and golden light, arms spread wide, with a tiny silhouetted figure visible far below
description: The painting, rendered in an expressive loose brushwork style, depicts a large winged figure rising vertically through a blast of fire and radiant golden-orange light. The figure's wings are spread wide, their edges jagged and flame-like. The body appears partially skeletal or exposed, catching the intense backlighting. Below, at the very base of the composition, a tiny dark silhouette of another figure stands at ground level, giving extreme scale to the ascending form. The palette is almost entirely hot — reds, oranges, and golds with dark charcoal shapes framing the sides. The style is painterly and expressionistic rather than fine-detail.
foreground: ascending winged skeletal figure in fire and golden light
background: fire eruption, dark rock walls, radiant glow
